text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
January this year is especially cold... Yet despite the weather, I'm out
on the training track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All around me are young racers preparing to start their shot at the
Classics this spring.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Only a few select racers qualify for the Classics! If you want in, you
gotta show me you got what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yes, sir!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Maaan, everyone sure is pumped up.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You can only attempt the Classic Races once in your career. If you
don't qualify, that's it.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You can only attempt the Classic Races once in your career. If you
don't qualify, that's it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and that's why hundreds, if not thousands of racers each year
dream of winning the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And after aaall that training, some of us still go and hog all the glory,
eh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't look at me like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As if you can talk. You'd have plenty of honors yourself if you took
your races seriously.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, who says I'm not takin' 'em seriously?! Don't you worry, I'm
planning on winning one or two of those classic races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, hear that? That's the sound of my adoring fans awaiting my
rise to glory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are those cheers for? It sounds like there's some sort of
commotion going on.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: DON'T IGNORE ME!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: That's another personal record!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard there was a promising rookie among the racers this year, but
she's way beyond what I expected.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to see from you, Suzuka. That speed of yours is
remarkable.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Once you've run your debut race, we'll use that experience to
develop a running style that makes use of your unique strengths.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, sounds good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All that hubbub for Suzuka, huh?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You know her?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You know her?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What, you don't? She and her crazy legs have been all the rage ever
since she entered the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So her debut is finally approaching... I can't wait to see what she can
do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't hear the name Silence Suzuka again until several weeks later
at the Kyoto Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
The press really came out in droves for this race. Are you also here for
Silence Suzuka's debut?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I can't wait to see her running. I even brought four
cameramen to fully capture it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sounds like today is Silence Suzuka's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I begin to wonder myself what sort of run could inspire so
many rumors, I hear footsteps approach me from behind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You there. Aren't you Team Sirius's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am Air Groove, vice president of the student council. But I'm sure
you've heard of me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like any other school, Tracen Academy has its own student council,
which offers support to the school in ways only students can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps surprisingly, Narita Brian is also an officer in the student
council, a subject her teammates love to tease her about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe any members of Team Sirius are participating in this
race... Could it be you're here for Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Kind of. I was in the area and figured I'd check out some races. I
didn't realize Suzuka would be here, though. Did you come for her
debut?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Kind of. I was in the area and figured I'd check out some races. I
didn't realize Suzuka would be here, though. Did you come for her
debut?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka and I have known each other for quite some time. What's
more, the student council has got their eye on her.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed. It seems the president has high hopes for her.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: The president... You mean Symboli Rudolf? Now I'm really excited to see her in action.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: The president... You mean Symboli Rudolf? Now I'm really excited to see her in action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Little did I know just how thrilling her race would be...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka begins rounding the final corner, still in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And look how far she's pulled ahead! But she's still going faster as she
enters the homestretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Two hundred meters left! Silence Suzuka speeds up even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite staying in the lead for the entire race, Silence Suzuka shows
no signs of fatigue. Instead, she leaves the pack farther and farther
behind...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This speed! She's ahead by five lengths—no, six! Just how fast can she
go?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka crosses the finish line! Her debut race ends in a
flawless victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's fast. Surprisingly fast. But more than that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes! Attagirl, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah... Ahem. So, what did you think of Suzuka? Fast, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah! So fast! But more than that...
choice_data_list: She looks like she's having so much fun!
She looks like she's having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah! So fast! But more than that...
choice_data_list: She looks like she's having so much fun!
She looks like she's having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Fun?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, well... Is that how you see it? What an interesting perspective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe...
